TEXT.citation: Gravius, Daniël. 1661. Het Heylige Evangelium Matthei en Johannis ofte Hagnau Ka D'llig Matiktik. Ka na sasoulat ti Mattheus, ti Johannes appa. Overgeset inde Formosaansche tale, voor de Inwoonders van Soulang, Mattau, Sinckan, Bacloan, Tavocan en Tevorang. Amsterdam: Michiel Hartogh.

S.FORM: KA ni-pæmting, dou ni-pat-tæi-kahan ti Jesus mattæ'i-simoulymmou ki sou k'atta, ka ni-k'ma ki Pahtatæutæuughan tyn,
KA ni-pæmting, dou ni-pat-tæi-kahan ti Jesus mattæ'i-simoulymmou ki sou k'atta, ka ni-k'ma ki Pahtatæutæuughan tyn,
S.TRANSL: Ende het is geschiet als Jesus alle dese woorden ghe-eyndight hadde dat hy tot lijne Ditcipelen sepde
And it came to pass, when Jesus had finished all these sayings, he said unto his disciples,
耶穌說完了這一切的話，就對門徒說：

S.FORM: Kavana'noumi ka rorouha-appa ki wæ'i mou-vatoug-ah ki halida'æu-an, ka pæ'ǣ-tounnoun eih ta Alak ki ka'æuloung tou pouna-væværæh-eih tyni-æn.
Kavana'noumi ka rorouha-appa ki wæ'i mou-vatoug-ah ki halida'æu-an, ka pæ'ǣ-tounnoun eih ta Alak ki ka'æuloung tou pouna-væværæh-eih tyni-æn.
S.TRANSL: Ghy weet dat nae twee
Ye know that after two days is the feast of the passover, and the Son of man is betrayed to be crucified.
「你們知道，過兩天是逾越節，人子將要被交給人，釘在十字架上。」

S.FORM: Anna ta ni-mæu'isal ta Si. bavau ka Tama-phik, ta makou-sasoulat, ki mamoumou-appa ki taou, tou las ki Dadyllo-ka Siba-vau, ka ti Kajasas ta nanang tyn.
Anna ta ni-mæu'isal ta Si. bavau ka Tama-phik, ta makou-sasoulat, ki mamoumou-appa ki taou, tou las ki Dadyllo-ka Sibavau, ka ti Kajasas ta nanang tyn.
S.TRANSL: Doe bergaderden de Ober Piiesters eei de Schaiftgegeleerde ende de Ouderlingen des Volcks inde sale des Hoogen-Piielters die genaemt was Cajaphas.
Then assembled together the chief priests, and the scribes, and the elders of the people, unto the palace of the high priest, who was called Caiaphas,
那時，祭司長和民間的長老聚集在大祭司稱為該亞法的院裏。

S.FORM: Ka ni-kmi-ym ki sou, ka touroung-auh nein ki sivanavan'an ta ti Jesus, ka paka-pætei-aul-appa ta teni.
Ka ni-kmi-ym ki sou, ka touroung-auh nein ki sivanavan'an ta ti Jesus, ka paka-pætei-aul-appa ta teni.
S.TRANSL: Ende beraedtslaeghden c samen dat sy Jefum met liftigheydt bangen ende dooden ouden.
And consulted that they might take Jesus by subtilty, and kill him.
大家商議要用詭計拿住耶穌，殺他，

S.FORM: Ka ni-k'ma ta neni: Assi tou ou-vavatoug-an, alei ka aousi-ah ki kavaroutti-vut'tan ki ta'u.
Ka ni-k'ma ta neni: Assi tou ou-vavatoug-an, alei ka aousi-ah ki kavaroutti-vut'tan ki ta'u.
S.TRANSL: Doch iy leyden : Niet in het. Feelt op datter geen oprotr en worde onde? het
But they said, Not on the feast day, lest there be an uproar among the people.
只是說：「當節的日子不可，恐怕民間生亂。」 （可14‧3－9；約12‧1－8）

S.FORM: Ka rou æia-koua ta ti Jesus tou Bethanien tou tallagh ti Simon ka outæum-in-ato [ki Leproos:]
Ka rou æia-koua ta ti Jesus tou Bethanien tou tallagh ti Simon ka outæum-in-ato [ki Leproos:]
S.TRANSL: Als nu Jesus te Bethanien was ten huyse Simonis des Melaetschen:
Now when Jesus was in Bethany, in the house of Simon the leper,
耶穌在伯大尼長大痲瘋的西門家裏，

S.FORM: Ni-ierroua tyni-æn ta jna ka mei-koua ki vahto ka poule ka roukoul, ka akou-rapol ka ouhang ki angal, ka ni-roudo tyn ta anna massi-halap ki voungo tyn tou ira-rong-en tyn tou avokkan.
Ni-ierroua tyni-æn ta jna ka mei-koua ki vahto ka poule ka roukoul, ka akou-rapol ka ouhang ki angal, ka ni-roudo tyn ta anna massi-halap ki voungo tyn tou ira-rong-en tyn tou avokkan.
S.TRANSL: Quam tot Hem een brouwe hebbende een alabaste:-flefsche mec seer kostelicke salbe ende gootse upt op lijn hooft daer hy aen [rafel} sat. _
There came unto him a woman having an alabaster box of very precious ointment, and poured it on his head, as he sat at meat.
有一個女人拿着一玉瓶極貴的香膏來，趁耶穌坐席的時候，澆在他的頭上。

S.FORM: Jrou ka kak'ytt'an ta anna ki Pahtatæutæuughan tyn, ouhang vi-mæiddingit ta neni, koun, Kæu-mang ta atta-ænno-an k'atta?
Jrou ka kak'ytt'an ta anna ki Pahtatæutæuughan tyn, ouhang vi-mæiddingit ta neni, koun, Kæu-mang ta atta-ænno-an k'atta?
S.TRANSL: Ende shne Discipelen [dat] fiende namen het seer qualick seggende Waer toe dit belies 4
But when his disciples saw it, they had indignation, saying, To what purpose is this waste?
門徒看見就很不喜悅，說：「何用這樣的枉費呢！

S.FORM: Ka ynna patou-ilpough pæ-peila tou ouhang ki angal ta rah-poul katta, papha-an-ei ta than tyn ki tæ'u ka malymmouk.
Ka ynna patou-ilpough pæ-peila tou ouhang ki angal ta rah-poul katta, papha-an-ei ta than tyn ki tæ'u ka malymmouk.
S.TRANSL: Wantdese salbe hadde konnen dier berkocht ende depenningen den Armen gegeben worden.
For this ointment might have been sold for much, and given to the poor.
這香膏可以賣許多錢，賙濟窮人。」

S.FORM: Ra tou oumhgan ti Jesus [ta atta] ni-k'ma neini-æn, Ka'u-mang ka paka-himkou-'noumi ta jna k'atta? Ka mariang ta na ryng-ei tyn jau-an-da.
Ra tou oumhgan ti Jesus [ta atta] ni-k'ma neini-æn, Ka'u-mang ka paka-himkou-'noumi ta jna k'atta? Ka mariang ta na ryng-ei tyn jau-an-da.
S.TRANSL: Maer Jesus [yolor] besstaende seyde tot haer Waerom dott ghy dese brouwe moeyte aen + Want n heefc een goet werck aen mp gewrocht.
When Jesus understood it, he said unto them, Why trouble ye the woman? for she hath wrought a good work upon me.
耶穌看出他們的意思，就說：「為甚麼難為這女人呢？她在我身上做的是一件美事。

S.FORM: 11 Ka myhkakona akou meæ'h-kamou ki ma-lymmouk aiakous ymoumi-æn, râ aou-si-ah-kamou myhkakoua jau-an.
11 Ka myhkakona akou meæ'h-kamou ki ma-lymmouk aiakous ymoumi-æn, râ aou-si-ah-kamou myhkakoua jau-an.
S.TRANSL: Want de Nrme hebt ghp altijdt metu matr mp en hebt ghy niet altijdt.
For ye have the poor always with you; but me ye have not always.
因為常有窮人和你們同在；只是你們不常有我。

S.FORM: Nda irou ka ni-roudo tyn ta rahpoul k'atta tou vouelau, ni-pamt-en tyn ta anna [tou sitan-in] ki ravak-ei jau-an.
Nda irou ka ni-roudo tyn ta rahpoul k'atta tou vouelau, ni-pamt-en tyn ta anna [tou sitan-in] ki ravak-ei jau-an.
S.TRANSL: want a sy dese salbe op myn lichaem gegoten heefc soo heeft sy Het gedaen tot [een boorbereydinge ban] myne begrabenisse
For in that she hath poured this ointment on my body, she did it for my burial.
她將這香膏澆在我身上是為我安葬做的。

S.FORM: Missing koun-nau-kamon, Toumang ka pattasasou-eih ta Ha gnau katta ka mariang tou ymmid ki Næi, pasousou-eil-appa hynna ta mamang ka na ryngei tyn tou hibava-lei-en tyni-æn.
Missing koun-nau-kamon, Toumang ka pattasasou-eih ta Ha gnau katta ka mariang tou ymmid ki Næi, pasousou-eil-appa hynna ta mamang ka na ryngei tyn tou hibava-lei-en tyni-æn.
S.TRANSL: Doorwaer segge ick u Alwaer dit Euangelinm gepredickt sal worden in de geheele werelt [ daer ] sal oock tot harer gedachtenisse gesp:oken worden ban t gene sy gedaen heeft.
Verily I say unto you, Wheresoever this gospel shall be preached in the whole world, there shall also this, that this woman hath done, be told for a memorial of her.
我實在告訴你們，普天之下，無論在甚麼地方傳這福音，也要述說這女人所行的，作個紀念。」 （可14‧10－11；路22‧3－6）

S.FORM: Tou kidi k'anna ni-d'ma-rang ta saät ki sat kytti-æn 'æb ki rouha k'anna, ka ti Judas Iska-rioth ta nanang tyn, ka ni-mou-koua ki Si-bavau ka Tama-p'hik,
Tou kidi k'anna ni-d'ma-rang ta saät ki sat kytti-æn 'æb ki rouha k'anna, ka ti Judas Iska-rioth ta nanang tyn, ka ni-mou-koua ki Si-bavau ka Tama-p'hik,
S.TRANSL: Doe gingheen ban de twaelbe genaemt Judas Atcarioth tot de Oberpirieliess
Then one of the twelve, called Judas Iscariot, went unto the chief priests,
當下，十二門徒裏有一個稱為加略人猶大的，去見祭司長，

S.FORM: K'ma, Mang ta p'hei-anei-moumi jæu-an, ka pa æ-tounnoun-eimau tyni-æn ymoumi-æn ka ni-si-kidi-en nein tyni-æn tourou kytti-æn ki malyttouk.
K'ma, Mang ta p'hei-anei-moumi jæu-an, ka pa æ-tounnoun-eimau tyni-æn ymoumi-æn ka ni-si-kidi-en nein tyni-æn tourou kytti-æn ki malyttouk.
S.TRANSL: Endesepde Wat wilt ghy my geben ende ick sal hemu oberleberen + Ende sp hebben Hem toegeleght Der: tigh silbere [ penningen. ]
And said unto them, What will ye give me, and I will deliver him unto you? And they covenanted with him for thirty pieces of silver.
說： 「我把他交給你們，你們願意給我多少錢？」他們就給了他三十塊錢。

S.FORM: Ka na kidi k'anna ni-han en tyn ta kidi ka mariang, ka mannono ka pa ä-tounnoun-an-eih tyn tyni-æn.
Ka na kidi k'anna ni-han en tyn ta kidi ka mariang, ka mannono ka pa ä-tounnoun-an-eih tyn tyni-æn.
S.TRANSL: Ende ban doen af focht hy gelegentheyt op dat hy hem oberleberen mochte.
And from that time he sought opportunity to betray him.

S.FORM: Ka tou naunamou ki wæ'i ka assi ni-pei-apyng-it [ta pæul] ni-iroua ta Pahtatautauughan ti Jesus, ka ni-koun nein teni-æn, Toumang ta kamoei-en-hou kata-nang-au-mian ymhouan pa-kan ki joukko ki Hæli-da'æu-en?

Ka tou naunamou ki wæ'i ka assi ni-pei-apyng-it [ta pæul] ni-iroua ta Pahtatautauughan ti Jesus, ka ni-koun nein teni-æn, Toumang ta kamoei-en-hou kata-nang-au-mian ymhouan pa-kan ki joukko ki Hæli-da'æu-en?
S.TRANSL: Ende op den certen [dagh] der onghehebelde f brooden, } quamen de Dittipclen tot Jelum seggende tot hem Waer wilt ghy dat — wy wy u thereyden het Pascha te eten
Now the first day of the feast of unleavened bread the disciples came to Jesus, saying unto him, Where wilt thou that we prepare for thee to eat the passover?
除酵節的第一天，門徒來問耶穌說：「你吃逾越節的筵席，要我們在哪裏給你預備？」

S.FORM: Ka ni-k'ma ta teni, Ou-koua-au tou æuma k'anna ti anno-an, ka bana tyni-æn, Na sou ki Mahtatæutæuuh, tou touk ta ki di-au, k-koua-ah-koh kman ym-hou-an [ki joukko] ki Hali-da-au-en lam ki Pahtatæutzuugh en-au.

Ka ni-k'ma ta teni, Ou-koua-au tou æuma k'anna ti anno-an, ka bana tyni-æn, Na sou ki Mahtatæutæuuh, tou touk ta ki di-au, k-koua-ah-koh kman ym-hou-an [ki joukko] ki Hali-da-au-en lam ki Pahtatæutzuugh en-au.
S.TRANSL: Ende p sepde Gaet henen in de adt tot sulck tenen ende segget hem Be Meefter leght mijnen tijdt is naby ick sal bp u het Pascha houden met mijne Dilcipelen.
And he said, Go into the city to such a man, and say unto him, The Master saith, My time is at hand; I will keep the passover at thy house with my disciples.
耶穌說：「你們進城去，到某人那裏，對他說：『夫子說：我的時候快到了，我與門徒要在你家裏守逾越節。』」

S.FORM: Ka ni-mei-amut ta Pahta-tæutæuugh-an, mama ki na si-a. tæutæuugh ti Jesus neini-æn, ka ni-patæu-tan nein [ta joukko] ki Hali-daæu-en.
Ka ni-mei-amut ta Pahta-tæutæuugh-an, mama ki na si-a. tæutæuugh ti Jesus neini-æn, ka ni-patæu-tan nein [ta joukko] ki Hali-daæu-en.
S.TRANSL: Ende de Discipelen deden gheliick Jesus haer bebolen hadde ende berepdden het Pascha.
And the disciples did as Jesus had appointed them; and they made ready the passover.
門徒遵着耶穌所吩咐的就去預備了逾越節的筵席。

S.FORM: Jrou ka mad-oung-ato ni-k-lam meirrong ki sat kytti-æn 'æb ki rouha.
Jrou ka mad-oung-ato ni-k-lam meirrong ki sat kytti-æn 'æb ki rouha.
S.TRANSL: Ende als het abondt geworden was fat hy am met de twaelbe.
Now when the even was come, he sat down with the twelve.
到了晚上，耶穌和十二個門徒坐席。

S.FORM: Jrou ka kannin nein, anna ta ni k'ma ta teni, Missing koun-nau-kamou, ka saät ymoumi-æn ta si-vanavana-ah jau-an.
Jrou ka kannin nein, anna ta ni k'ma ta teni, Missing koun-nau-kamou, ka saät ymoumi-æn ta si-vanavana-ah jau-an.
S.TRANSL: Ende doe sy aten [eyde hy Doorwaer ick seggeu Dat een ban u my sal berraen.
And as they did eat, he said, Verily I say unto you, that one of you shall betray me.
正吃的時候，耶穌說：「我實在告訴你們，你們中間有一個人要賣我了。」

S.FORM: Ka rou ou-hang ta neni mivavoulas, ni-mattæi-naunamou ta meihbouavou-al neini-æn mat-tæ'i-kmahynna tyni-æn, Ti jau kaua Meirang?
Ka rou ou-hang ta neni mivavoulas, ni-mattæi-naunamou ta meihbouavou-al neini-æn mat-tæ'i-kmahynna tyni-æn, Ti jau kaua Meirang?
S.TRANSL: Ende sy seer bedroeft geworden zijnde begonnen een pegelick ban hae: tot em re seggen Ben ick het
And they were exceeding sorrowful, and began every one of them to say unto him, Lord, is it I?
他們就甚憂愁，一個一個地問他說：「主，是我嗎？」

S.FORM: Ka ni-mattæ'i-v'lli ta teni, kma, Teni ka smilam jau-an dmæuk ki rima tyn tou tangia, teni ta si-vanavana-ah jau-an.
Ka ni-mattæ'i-v'lli ta teni, kma, Teni ka smilam jau-an dmæuk ki rima tyn tou tangia, teni ta si-vanavana-ah jau-an.
S.TRANSL: Ende hy antwoordende sepde Die de hantmetmp mn de sthotel m doopt die sal mp berraden.
And he answered and said, He that dippeth his hand with me in the dish, the same shall betray me.
耶穌回答說：「同我蘸手在盤子裏的，就是他要賣我。

S.FORM: Ouma-ato ka d'marang ta Alak ki ka'æuloung mama ki nisoulat-en-ato tyni-æn, râ ænnaih ki ta'u k'anna ka sivanavana-ah ki Alak ki ka'æuloung, ynna ma-riang tyni-æn, rou assi ni-pei-alak-kin ta ka auloung kanna.

Ouma-ato ka d'marang ta Alak ki ka'æuloung mama ki nisoulat-en-ato tyni-æn, râ ænnaih ki ta'u k'anna ka sivanavana-ah ki Alak ki ka'æuloung, ynna ma-riang tyni-æn, rou assi ni-pei-alak-kin ta ka auloung kanna.
S.TRANSL: De Sone des Menfchen gaet wel henen gelijck ban hem gelchreben is maer wee dien mentche door wileKen be Sone des Menschen berraden wort het ware hem ott so die mensche niet geborenen hadde geweest, |
The Son of man goeth as it is written of him: but woe unto that man by whom the Son of man is betrayed! it had been good for that man if he had not been born.
人子必要去世，正如經上指着他所寫的；但賣人子的人有禍了！那人不生在世上倒好。」

S.FORM: Katou Judas ka si-vanavana tyni-æn ta ni-mattæ'i-v'lli, k'ma, Ti jau kana Rabbi? Ni-k'ma ta teni tyni-æn, Pattæ'i-rouk-en-ato-'mhou.
Katou Judas ka si-vanavana tyni-æn ta ni-mattæ'i-v'lli, k'ma, Ti jau kana Rabbi? Ni-k'ma ta teni tyni-æn, Pattæ'i-rouk-en-ato-'mhou.
S.TRANSL: Ende Judas die hem berriedt antwoordde ende lepde Ben ick t Kabbis Hy leyde tot hem Ghy hebt het gifegh.
Then Judas, which betrayed him, answered and said, Master, is it I? He said unto him, Thou hast said.
賣耶穌的猶大問他說：「拉比，是我嗎？」耶穌說：「你說的是。」 （可14‧22－26；路22‧15－20；林前11‧23－25）

S.FORM: Jrou ka mei-kakan ta neni, ni-mmeugh ta ti Jesus ki paoul, ka rou ni-makou-v'lli makou Alildd, ni-pihpi tyn, ka ni-phan tyn ki Pahtateuteung-han tyn ta atta, ka ni-kma, Arau, kan-nau, atta ta voual-au.

Jrou ka mei-kakan ta neni, ni-mmeugh ta ti Jesus ki paoul, ka rou ni-makou-v'lli makou Alildd, ni-pihpi tyn, ka ni-phan tyn ki Pahtateuteung-han tyn ta atta, ka ni-kma, Arau, kan-nau, atta ta voual-au.
S.TRANSL: Ende als sy aten nam Jesus het broodt ende gheregent hebbende brack hy het ende gaf het den Disc1pelen ende sepde Nemet etet dat is mijn Lichaem.
And as they were eating, Jesus took bread, and blessed it, and brake it, and gave it to the disciples, and said, Take, eat; this is my body.
他們吃的時候，耶穌拿起餅來，祝福，就擘開，遞給門徒，說：「你們拿着吃，這是我的身體」；

S.FORM: Ka rou ni-eugh tyn ta hæu-ugh ka äyht-en, ka rou ni-pako. vili-tyn mako-Alilid, ni-p'hen tyn neini-æn ta atta, k'ma, Houh-tmouk-au moumi tou [hæuugh ki] atta.
Ka rou ni-eugh tyn ta hæu-ugh ka äyht-en, ka rou ni-pako. vili-tyn mako-Alilid, ni-p'hen tyn neini-æn ta atta, k'ma, Houh-tmouk-au moumi tou [hæuugh ki] atta.
S.TRANSL: Ende hy nam den Dtiinckbeker ende ghedanckt hebbende gaf hae: [dien,] segghende Drinckt alle daer uyt. _
And he took the cup, and gave thanks, and gave it to them, saying, Drink ye all of it;
又拿起杯來，祝謝了，遞給他們，說：「你們都喝這個；

S.FORM: Ka atta ta 'æmægh-au, [ta amagh] ki Si-kavag-hen ka va'æu, ka tiri-auh alei ki mabatoung tou atta-nynno-an ki varau.
Ka atta ta 'æmægh-au, [ta amagh] ki Si-kavag-hen ka va'æu, ka tiri-auh alei ki mabatoung tou atta-nynno-an ki varau.
S.TRANSL: Want dat is mjn bloedt het[bloedt] des Nieuwen Teltaments het welck boor bele bergoten wordt tot bergebinge der sonden,
For this is my blood of the new testament, which is shed for many for the remission of sins.
因為這是我立約的血，為多人流出來，使罪得赦。

S.FORM: Ka pasousou-en-au-kamou, ka assimau yht-auh na kidi hnyn ki na voua k'atta ki ngara ki ka-ræumætæh, tou kidi-appa ki wa'i kanna, rou hou-baau-au-mau myt ta atta hmou-lam ymou-mi-en tou pei-sasou-an ki Rara-man-au.

Ka pasousou-en-au-kamou, ka assimau yht-auh na kidi hnyn ki na voua k'atta ki ngara ki ka-ræumætæh, tou kidi-appa ki wa'i kanna, rou hou-baau-au-mau myt ta atta hmou-lam ymou-mi-en tou pei-sasou-an ki Rara-man-au.
S.TRANSL: Endeickseggeu dat ick ban nu aen niet en sal drincken ban dese beucht des wijnltocks rot op dien dagh wanneer ick met u deselbe nieuw sal drincken n t honinckriick mijus
But I say unto you, I will not drink henceforth of this fruit of the vine, until that day when I drink it new with you in my Father's kingdom.
但我告訴你們，從今以後，我不再喝這葡萄汁，直到我在我父的國裏同你們喝新的那日子。」

S.FORM: Jrou ka taka-kahan nein ta taka-loulough-an, ni-t'papanah ta neni moukoua tou voukkyn ka makka-vavoua ki akou-imagh.
Jrou ka taka-kahan nein ta taka-loulough-an, ni-t'papanah ta neni moukoua tou voukkyn ka makka-vavoua ki akou-imagh.
S.TRANSL: Endeals sy den Loffangh gesongen hadden ging sy uyt na den Olyfbergh.
And when they had sung an hymn, they went out into the mount of Olives.

S.FORM: Anna ta ni-k'ma ta ti Jesus neini-æn, Paka-ymdau-kamou paka-varau ki euvan k'atta: Alei ka ni-sasoulat-in, Ep'yd-aumau ta Souajam, ka papæiävoak-auh ta joukko ki jouagh.
Anna ta ni-k'ma ta ti Jesus neini-æn, Paka-ymdau-kamou paka-varau ki euvan k'atta: Alei ka ni-sasoulat-in, Ep'yd-aumau ta Souajam, ka papæiävoak-auh ta joukko ki jouagh.
S.TRANSL: Boe sepde Jesus tot Haer Ghy sult alle am mp ge-ergert worden in desen nacht: Want dae? is geschreben Ick (al de Herde: llaen ende de schapen de: kudde fullen berstropt worden.
Then saith Jesus unto them, All ye shall be offended because of me this night: for it is written, I will smite the shepherd, and the sheep of the flock shall be scattered abroad.
那時，耶穌對他們說：「今夜，你們為我的緣故都要跌倒。因為經上記着說：

S.FORM: . Jrou ka hkaha-al-ato-koh hpit, tourourou-ah-koh ymou mi-æn mou-koua tou Galileen.
. Jrou ka hkaha-al-ato-koh hpit, tourourou-ah-koh ymou mi-æn mou-koua tou Galileen.
S.TRANSL: Waet nae dat ick sal opgheltaen zijn sal ick u boorgaen na Galiler
But after I am risen again, I will go before you into Galilee.
但我復活以後，要在你們以先往加利利去。」

S.FORM: Râ ni-mattæ'i-v'lli ta ti Pe-trus k'ma tyni-æn, Meita rou paka ymd-auh ta neni paka-varau alei ymhou-an, myh-kakoua koh assi pakavarau-auh ta ti jæu.
Râ ni-mattæ'i-v'lli ta ti Pe-trus k'ma tyni-æn, Meita rou paka ymd-auh ta neni paka-varau alei ymhou-an, myh-kakoua koh assi pakavarau-auh ta ti jæu.
S.TRANSL: Doch Petrus antwoordende sepde tot hem Al wierden sy oock atle aen u ghe-ergert ick en sal nimmermer: ge-rrgert worden.
Peter answered and said unto him, Though all men shall be offended because of thee, yet will I never be offended.
彼得說：「眾人雖然為你的緣故跌倒，我卻永不跌倒。」

S.FORM: Ni-k'ma ta ti Jesus tyni æn, Missing kounnau kow, ka tou euvan katta dou assi-appa mouni ta taoukka, ka t' touroul-ei-mhourmau jau-an.
Ni-k'ma ta ti Jesus tyni æn, Missing kounnau kow, ka tou euvan katta dou assi-appa mouni ta taoukka, ka t' touroul-ei-mhourmau jau-an.
S.TRANSL: Jesus leyde tot ham Doorwaer ick segge u dat ghy in desen-selben nacht eer be haen gekraeyt sal hebben my driemael sult berTr & sepde tothem
Jesus said unto him, Verily I say unto thee, That this night, before the cock crow, thou shalt deny me thrice.
耶穌說：「我實在告訴你，今夜雞叫以先，你要三次不認我。」

S.FORM: Ni-k'ma ta ti Petrus tyni. an, Meita-rou pis-lalam-appa mau-kow mapatei, assi-koh rmau-ah ymhou-an. Ka komm'appa hynna ki sou ta ymmid ki Pahta tæutæuughan.
Ni-k'ma ta ti Petrus tyni. an, Meita-rou pis-lalam-appa mau-kow mapatei, assi-koh rmau-ah ymhou-an. Ka komm'appa hynna ki sou ta ymmid ki Pahta tæutæuughan.
S.TRANSL: r0S lepde tot Al migelte ick oock met u fterben so en sal ick u geenfins berloochenen. Delghelijcks feyden oock alle de Biscipelen, m
Peter said unto him, Though I should die with thee, yet will I not deny thee. Likewise also said all the disciples.
彼得說：「我就是必須和你同死，也總不能不認你。」眾門徒都是這樣說。 （可14‧32－42；路22‧39－46）

S.FORM: Anna ta ni-toulam neini-an ta ti Jesus mou-koua tou jtou-kakoua-an ka pananang-en Geth-semane, ka ni-k'ma ki Pahtatæu-tæuughan, Mierrong-hia tou ki-di ki ou-koua-eimau hynna mako-Alilid.
Anna ta ni-toulam neini-an ta ti Jesus mou-koua tou jtou-kakoua-an ka pananang-en Geth-semane, ka ni-k'ma ki Pahtatæu-tæuughan, Mierrong-hia tou ki-di ki ou-koua-eimau hynna mako-Alilid.
S.TRANSL: Doe ty Hae: in een plaetse genaemt Gethsemane ende seyde tot de Dilcipelen Sit hier ne| er der tot dat ick henen gae enDe aldaer sal ghebeden heb-
Then cometh Jesus with them unto a place called Gethsemane, and saith unto the disciples, Sit ye here, while I go and pray yonder.
耶穌同門徒來到一個地方，名叫客西馬尼，就對他們說：「你們坐在這裏，等我到那邊去禱告。」

S.FORM: Jrou ka patou-para tyni, æn ti Petrus-an, ki rarouha-appa ka na alalak tipaebedeus, ni-ma-naunamou mavoulas malouas-ap-pa mahymko ta teni.
Jrou ka patou-para tyni, æn ti Petrus-an, ki rarouha-appa ka na alalak tipaebedeus, ni-ma-naunamou mavoulas malouas-ap-pa mahymko ta teni.
S.TRANSL: Ende met hem nemende Petrum ende de twee sonen Zebedet begon hy droebigh ende setr beangst te worden, : '
And he took with him Peter and the two sons of Zebedee, and began to be sorrowful and very heavy.
於是帶着彼得和西庇太的兩個兒子同去，就憂愁起來，極其難過，

S.FORM: Anna ta ni-k'ma ta teni neini-æn, Mataraæugh mavoulas ta vatti-au tou kidi ki kapatei-an jtou-koua hia mahamæuæ'-æ itou-lam jau-an.
Anna ta ni-k'ma ta teni neini-æn, Mataraæugh mavoulas ta vatti-au tou kidi ki kapatei-an jtou-koua hia mahamæuæ'-æ itou-lam jau-an.
S.TRANSL: Doe seyde hy tot haer Mijne riele is gheheel bedroeft totter doodt toe: blyft Hier ende waeckt met mp.
Then saith he unto them, My soul is exceeding sorrowful, even unto death: tarry ye here, and watch with me.
便對他們說：「我心裏甚是憂傷，幾乎要死；你們在這裏等候，和我一同警醒。」

S.FORM: Jrou ka ni-oukakoukoua tyn, ni-mahgakup ki vlung tyn, ka ni-mako-Alilid, k'ma, Rama au, heirou ka ilpoug-hin, pahali-auragha jau-an ki hæuugh k'atta ka äyht-tan: Nda assi mama ki ka-moei-en-au, râ mam'æppa ki ka-moei-en-hou.

Jrou ka ni-oukakoukoua tyn, ni-mahgakup ki vlung tyn, ka ni-mako-Alilid, k'ma, Rama au, heirou ka ilpoug-hin, pahali-auragha jau-an ki hæuugh k'atta ka äyht-tan: Nda assi mama ki ka-moei-en-au, râ mam'æppa ki kamoei-en-hou.
S.TRANSL: Ende een weynigh boort gegaen zijnde biel hp op stjn aengelicht biddende seggende Myn Dader indien het mogelick is laet dese Diinck-beke; ban my boorby gat:Doch niet geliick ick wil maer geliick ghy [wilt.]
And he went a little farther, and fell on his face, and prayed, saying, O my Father, if it be possible, let this cup pass from me: nevertheless not as I will, but as thou wilt.
他就稍往前走，俯伏在地，禱告說：「我父啊，倘若可行，求你叫這杯離開我。然而，不要照我的意思，只要照你的意思。」

S.FORM: Ka ni-mou-kona ta teni ki Pahtatautæuughan, ka ni-kmaba lei neini-æn ka meirip, ka ni-k'ma ti Petrus-an, Maurou-kamou kaua mahamauä toulam, jau-an sasat kita lei?
Ka ni-mou-kona ta teni ki Pahtatautæuughan, ka ni-kmaba lei neini-æn ka meirip, ka ni-k'ma ti Petrus-an, Maurou-kamou kaua mahamauä toulam, jau-an sasat kita lei?
S.TRANSL: Ende hy quam tot ds Disciptlen ende bondse flapende ende sepde tot Petrum En kondt ghp dan niet ren upre met my waecken # w mm_
And he cometh unto the disciples, and findeth them asleep, and saith unto Peter, What, could ye not watch with me one hour?
來到門徒那裏，見他們睡着了，就對彼得說：「怎麼樣？你們不能同我警醒片時嗎？

S.FORM: Nda mahanaua-Alilid-a, ki assi-moumi ou-koua-eih tou rpung-an: Massorol ta Joepan, rå assi masaukit ta vaat.
Nda mahanaua-Alilid-a, ki assi-moumi ou-koua-eih tou rpung-an: Massorol ta Joepan, rå assi masaukit ta vaat.
S.TRANSL: Waeckt ende bidt op dat ghy niet in bersoeckinge en komt: de geelt is wel gewilligh | maer het bleesch 1s ac w
Watch and pray, that ye enter not into temptation: the spirit indeed is willing, but the flesh is weak.
總要警醒禱告，免得入了迷惑。你們心靈固然願意，肉體卻軟弱了。」

S.FORM: Mila tou kararouha dou ou-koun tyn, ni-æma-ou-Rama-au, heirou assi mali-phough mali-æuragh iauan ta hæuuh katta ka ayht-ten, dou assi-mau hou-ouro-en myt, nda paanit-auto ta kamoei-en-hou.
Mila tou kararouha dou ou-koun tyn, ni-æma-ou-Rama-au, heirou assi mali-phough mali-æuragh iauan ta hæuuh katta ka ayht-ten, dou assi-mau hou-ouro-en myt, nda paanit-auto ta kamoei-en-hou.
S.TRANSL: Wedtrom ten tweeden-mael henen gaende badt hy feggende Mijn Dade? indien dee Drinckbeke; ban mpmetboorbp en kan gaen ten ry dat ick hem drincke uwen wille gefchiede.
He went away again the second time, and prayed, saying, O my Father, if this cup may not pass away from me, except I drink it, thy will be done.
第二次又去禱告說：「我父啊，這杯若不能離開我，必要我喝，就願你的意旨成全。」

S.FORM: Ka dou mou-koua ta teni, mila kmabalei neini-æn ka meirip: alei ka ouhang marisigh ta matta nein.
Ka dou mou-koua ta teni, mila kmabalei neini-æn ka meirip: alei ka ouhang marisigh ta matta nein.
S.TRANSL: Ende komende [ by haer J bondt Hy'se wederom Napende : want hare oogen waren beswaerr,
And he came and found them asleep again: for their eyes were heavy.
又來，見他們睡着了，因為他們的眼睛困倦。

S.FORM: Ka dou payhkakoua neini-an, ni-ou-koun tyn mila, ka ni-mako-Alilid tou katatourou, mat-tæ'i-la teni ki sou-rà.
Ka dou payhkakoua neini-an, ni-ou-koun tyn mila, ka ni-mako-Alilid tou katatourou, mat-tæ'i-la teni ki sou-rà.
S.TRANSL: Ende haer latende gingh hy wederom henen ende badt ten derden-mael feggende deelbe woorden.
And he left them, and went away again, and prayed the third time, saying the same words.
耶穌又離開他們去了。第三次禱告，說的話還是與先前一樣。

S.FORM: Anna ta ni-mou-koua ta teni ki Pahtatæutæuughan tyn, k'ma neini-æn, masinipp-à smaki-likough ki mangahar pæ'i-hababa: K'ytt'ei matouk-ato ta kidi ki ta'-lei, ka pa'a-tounnoun-auh ta Alak ki ka'æuloung tou rima ki tama-kavarau.

Anna ta ni-mou-koua ta teni ki Pahtatæutæuughan tyn, k'ma neini-æn, masinipp-à smaki-likough ki mangahar pæ'i-hababa: K'ytt'ei matouk-ato ta kidi ki ta'-lei, ka pa'a-tounnoun-auh ta Alak ki ka'æuloung tou rima ki tama-kavarau.
S.TRANSL: Doe quam hy tot lijne Dilcipelen ende eyde tot haer Slaept[nu] boort ende rultet: Siet de upre ig na by gekomen ende de Sone des menlchen wordt ober gelebert in de handen der condaren.
Then cometh he to his disciples, and saith unto them, Sleep on now, and take your rest: behold, the hour is at hand, and the Son of man is betrayed into the hands of sinners.
於是來到門徒那裏，對他們說：「現在你們仍然睡覺安歇吧！時候到了，人子被賣在罪人手裏了。

S.FORM: Matti-mæu-æhpit, ou koua-ei-mytta, k'ytt'ei, mou-touk-ato ta sim'hamha iau-an.
Matti-mæu-æhpit, ou koua-ei-mytta, k'ytt'ei, mou-touk-ato ta sim'hamha iau-an.
S.TRANSL: Start op laet ons gaen liet hy is na by die mp berraedt. | '
Rise, let us be going: behold, he is at hand that doth betray me.

S.FORM: Jrou ka masousou-appa ta teni, k'ytt'ei, Ni-iroua ta ti Judas ka saät ki sat kytti-æn 'æb ki rou-ha, ka toulam tyni-æn ta kalauan ka irang ka mei-koua ki tyrrau ki vavouvoukbouk, ka ni-padingien ki Tama-p'hik ka Sibavau, ki Ma moumou-appa ki ta'u.

Jrou ka masousou-appa ta teni, k'ytt'ei, Ni-iroua ta ti Judas ka saät ki sat kytti-æn 'æb ki rouha, ka toulam tyni-æn ta kalauan ka irang ka mei-koua ki tyrrau ki vavouvoukbouk, ka ni-padingien ki Tama-p'hik ka Sibavau, ki Ma moumou-appa ki ta'u.
S.TRANSL: Ende als hy noch fprack liet Judas een ban de twaelbe quam ende met hem een groote ichare met sweerdenende ftocken [ghefonden] ban de Ober piriefteren ende Ouderlingen des Dolcks.
And while he yet spake, lo, Judas, one of the twelve, came, and with him a great multitude with swords and staves, from the chief priests and elders of the people.
說話之間，那十二個門徒裏的猶大來了，並有許多人帶着刀棒，從祭司長和民間的長老那裏與他同來。

S.FORM: Ka teni ka si-vanavana ty-ni-æn, ni-pou-kidi neini-æn, k'ma, Teni ka bæigh-au-mau, teni ta ti anna, tmouroung-å tyni-æn.
Ka teni ka si-vanavana ty-ni-æn, ni-pou-kidi neini-æn, k'ma, Teni ka bæigh-au-mau, teni ta ti anna, tmouroung-å tyni-æn.
S.TRANSL: Ende die hem berriedt hadde haer een teecKen gegheben segghende Dien ick sal kussen deselbe is het grijpt hem.
Now he that betrayed him gave them a sign, saying, Whomsoever I shall kiss, that same is he: hold him fast.
那賣耶穌的給了他們一個暗號，說：「我與誰親嘴，誰就是他。你們可以拿住他。」

S.FORM: Ka madys dou mou-koua ti Jesus-an, ni-koun tyn, Tabe Rabbi, kani-bæigh tyni-æn.
Ka madys dou mou-koua ti Jesus-an, ni-koun tyn, Tabe Rabbi, kani-bæigh tyni-æn.
S.TRANSL: Ende tegstondt komende tot Jelum eyde hy weelt ghegroet Kabbi ; ende Hp kuste hem.
And forthwith he came to Jesus, and said, Hail, master; and kissed him.
猶大隨即到耶穌跟前，說：「請拉比安」，就與他親嘴。

S.FORM: Râ ni-k'ma ta ti Jesus tyni-æn, Diou, oua-mang kow hia? Anna ta dou ni-moutouk ta neni, ni-pæ-tkoua ki rima ti Jesus-an, ka ni-tmouroung-appa tyni-æn.
Râ ni-k'ma ta ti Jesus tyni-æn, Diou, oua-mang kow hia? Anna ta dou ni-moutouk ta neni, ni-pæ-tkoua ki rima ti Jesus-an, ka ni-tmouroung-appa tyni-æn.
S.TRANSL: Mae Jesus lepde tot Hem Driendt waer toe 3Ht ghy hier + Doe quamen fp toe ende loeghen de handen gen Jesum ende grepen hem.
And Jesus said unto him, Friend, wherefore art thou come? Then came they, and laid hands on Jesus and took him.
耶穌對他說：「朋友，你來要做的事，就做吧。」於是那些人上前，下手拿住耶穌。

S.FORM: Ka k'ytt'ei, sasat neini-æn ka tou-læm ti Jesus-an, dou ni-sikkigh ki rima, ni-lmouhgout ki tyrræu tyn, ka ni-rmad ki kouncia ki Dadyllo, tubbo ki tang-ira tyn.
Ka k'ytt'ei, sasat neini-æn ka tou-læm ti Jesus-an, dou ni-sikkigh ki rima, ni-lmouhgout ki tyrræu tyn, ka ni-rmad ki kouncia ki Dadyllo, tubbo ki tang-ira tyn.
S.TRANSL: Endesiet een ban de ghene die met Jesu waren dehandt untsteeckendetrock syn sweerdt uyt ende laende den dienstknecht des Hoogen-piiefters hieuw syne oore af.
And, behold, one of them which were with Jesus stretched out his hand, and drew his sword, and struck a servant of the high priest's, and smote off his ear.
有跟隨耶穌的一個人伸手拔出刀來，將大祭司的僕人砍了一刀，削掉了他一個耳朵。

S.FORM: Anna ta ni-k'ma ta ti Jesus tyni-æn, Pou-likoug-au pou-ka-rouloung ta tyrræu-ouho: alei ka na mamang ta mara ki tyrrau, sid-ad-au pakapatei ta neni ki tyrræu.
Anna ta ni-k'ma ta ti Jesus tyni-æn, Pou-likoug-au pou-ka-rouloung ta tyrræu-ouho: alei ka na mamang ta mara ki tyrrau, sid-ad-au pakapatei ta neni ki tyrræu.
S.TRANSL: Boe seyde Jesus tot Hem Keert uw' sweerde in fijne plactse : want alle die Het sweert nemen sullen doo? het sweert beygaen.
Then said Jesus unto him, Put up again thy sword into his place: for all they that take the sword shall perish with the sword.
耶穌對他說：「收刀入鞘吧！凡動刀的，必死在刀下。

S.FORM: Pah-dimdim-en-hou lava, ka assi-koh makou-lpough ma-kou-Alilid hnyn ki Raraman-au, ka pa-tou-læm-ah ta teni jau-an masaoun madagh ki sat kytti-æn 'æb ki rouha ki Legioenen, ki Tama-Gnæu.
Pah-dimdim-en-hou lava, ka assi-koh makou-lpough ma-kou-Alilid hnyn ki Raraman-au, ka pa-tou-læm-ah ta teni jau-an masaoun madagh ki sat kytti-æn 'æb ki rouha ki Legioenen, ki Tama-Gnæu.
S.TRANSL: Ofmeynt ghy dat ick mijnen Vadernu niet en kan bidden ende hy sal my mee als twaelf legioenen Engelen by setten
Thinkest thou that I cannot now pray to my Father, and he shall presently give me more than twelve legions of angels?
你想，我不能求我父現在為我差遣十二營多天使來嗎？

S.FORM: Nda pavut-auh mama ki mang ta na sasoulat, [ka k'ma] ka pam't-an-eih komma-hynna ta ma-mang k'atta.
Nda pavut-auh mama ki mang ta na sasoulat, [ka k'ma] ka pam't-an-eih komma-hynna ta ma-mang k'atta.
S.TRANSL: Hoe souden dan de Schaiften berbult worden fdie feggen] dat het alsoo geschieden moet + .
But how then shall the scriptures be fulfilled, that thus it must be?
若是這樣，經上所說，事情必須如此的話怎麼應驗呢？」

S.FORM: Tou kidi ki tæ'lei katta ni-k'ma ta ti Jesus ki kalau-an, Ni-t'papænæh-kamou mama ki mou-kouah ki Tama-lpogh, ki tyrrau ki vavouvouk-bouk, alei ki tou roung-au-monmi jauian : wa'i ni-mi-sal-koh mierrong ymoumi-æn mahtatæutæuugh tou Kouva ki tatamd-den ki Alid, ka assikamou ni-tmouroung jau-an.

Tou kidi ki tæ'lei katta ni-k'ma ta ti Jesus ki kalau-an, Ni-t'papænæh-kamou mama ki mou-kouah ki Tama-lpogh, ki tyrrau ki vavouvouk-bouk, alei ki tou roung-au-monmi jauian : wa'i ni-mi-sal-koh mierrong ymoumi-æn mahtatæutæuugh tou Kouva ki tatamd-den ki Alid, ka assikamou ni-tmouroung jau-an.
S.TRANSL: Ter selber upre sprack Jesus tot de scharen Ghy 3yt zijt uytghegaen als teghen eenen moorden aer met sweerden ende [tocken om my te bangen: dagelicks (at ick by u leerende in den Tempel ende ghy en hebt my met gegeepen.
In that same hour said Jesus to the multitudes, Are ye come out as against a thief with swords and staves for to take me? I sat daily with you teaching in the temple, and ye laid no hold on me.
當時，耶穌對眾人說：「你們帶着刀棒出來拿我，如同拿強盜嗎？我天天坐在殿裏教訓人，你們並沒有拿我。

S.FORM: Râ ni-pamt-en ta-mamang k'atta alei ka pavut-aul-ato ta na sasoulat ki Tama Mattæ'i-tan-da. Tou kidi k'anna ni-pou-ymmid ilpout ta Pahtatæutæuug-han tyn, pa-itou-koua tyni-æn.
Râ ni-pamt-en ta-mamang k'atta alei ka pavut-aul-ato ta na sasoulat ki Tama Mattæ'i-tan-da. Tou kidi k'anna ni-pou-ymmid ilpout ta Pahtatæutæuug-han tyn, pa-itou-koua tyni-æn.
S.TRANSL: Doch dit alles is gheschiedt op dat de Schrifcen det: Propheten souden berbult worden. Doe bluchteden alle de Discipelen hem berlatende.
But all this was done, that the scriptures of the prophets might be fulfilled. Then all the disciples forsook him, and fled.
但這一切的事成就了，為要應驗先知書上的話。」當下，門徒都離開他，逃走了。 （可14‧53－65；路22‧54－55，63－71；約18‧13－14，19－24）

S.FORM: Neni ka ni-tmouroung ti Jesus-an, ni-mad [tyni-en] pa-ou-koua ti Kaisas-an ka Dadyllo ka Si-bavau, ni-mæu'i-sâl-hynna ta Makou-sasoulat ki Mamou-mou-appa.
Neni ka ni-tmouroung ti Jesus-an, ni-mad [tyni-en] pa-ou-koua ti Kaisas-an ka Dadyllo ka Si-bavau, ni-mæu'i-sâl-hynna ta Makou-sasoulat ki Mamou-mou-appa.
S.TRANSL: Die nn Jelum gebangen hadden lepdden [hem]. henen tot Cajapham den Hooghen piielter alwaer de Schaift-gheleerde ende Ouderlingen bergadert waren.
And they that had laid hold on Jesus led him away to Caiaphas the high priest, where the scribes and the elders were assembled.
拿耶穌的人把他帶到大祭司該亞法那裏去；文士和長老已經在那裏聚會。

S.FORM: Ka ni-itou-dallia itou-äugh tyni-æn ta ti Petrus tou kidi-appa ki las ki Dadyllo, ka rou mou-rbo-ato, ni-mi-lam mierrong ki Makoua, ka kakytta-auh tyn ta lymmou-lymmou.
Ka ni-itou-dallia itou-äugh tyni-æn ta ti Petrus tou kidi-appa ki las ki Dadyllo, ka rou mou-rbo-ato, ni-mi-lam mierrong ki Makoua, ka kakytta-auh tyn ta lymmou-lymmou.
S.TRANSL: Ende Petrus bolgde hem ban berre tot aen de sale des Hoogen piielters ende binnen gegaen zijnde sat hy by de dienaren om het epnde te lien.
But Peter followed him afar off unto the high priest's palace, and went in, and sat with the servants, to see the end.
彼得遠遠地跟着耶穌，直到大祭司的院子，進到裏面，就和差役同坐，要看這事到底怎樣。

S.FORM: Râ Tama-P'hik ka Si-bæ-vau, Mamoumou, ki na-pæui-sasal-appa ta ni-kmi'ym ki sou ka pattæ ihail-in si-haharang tou doummati Jesus-an, alei ki paka-patei-au nein tyni-æn, ka assi nein ni-pæki-valei-en-dâ.

Râ Tama-P'hik ka Si-bæ-vau, Mamoumou, ki na-pæui-sasal-appa ta ni-kmi'ym ki sou ka pattæ ihail-in si-haharang tou doummati Jesus-an, alei ki paka-patei-au nein tyni-æn, ka assi nein ni-pæki-valei-en-dâ.
S.TRANSL: Ende de Ober piiefters ende de Ouderlinghen ende dengheheelen GrootenKaedt ochten balsche getuygenisse tegen Jelum op dat sp hem dooden mochten ende en bonden niet.
Now the chief priests, and elders, and all the council, sought false witness against Jesus, to put him to death;
祭司長和全公會尋找假見證控告耶穌，要治死他。

S.FORM: Mou-kounna ka maba toung ta Gmail ka si-haharang ka ni-iroua-hynna, assi nein ni-paki-valei-en ki mamang.
Mou-kounna ka maba toung ta Gmail ka si-haharang ka ni-iroua-hynna, assi nein ni-paki-valei-en ki mamang.
S.TRANSL: Ende hoewel daer bele balsche getupgen toe ghekomen men waren soo en bonden fp {doch} met.
But found none: yea, though many false witnesses came, yet found they none. At the last came two false witnesses,
雖有好些人來作假見證，總得不着實據。末後有兩個人前來，說：

S.FORM: Tou äugh-dâ ni-iroua ta rarouha ki Gmail ka sihaharang, ka ni-k ma, Teni katta ta ni-k'ma-k'ma, Kou-lpoughen-au kuhta ta Kouva ki tatamd-den ki'Alid, ka mei-likough mei-ryngei ki anna tou toutourou ki wæ'i.

Tou äugh-dâ ni-iroua ta rarouha ki Gmail ka sihaharang, ka ni-k ma, Teni katta ta ni-k'ma-k'ma, Kou-lpoughen-au kuhta ta Kouva ki tatamd-den ki'Alid, ka mei-likough mei-ryngei ki anna tou toutourou ki wæ'i.
S.TRANSL: Mar; ten laetften quamen twee balsche ghetupghen ende sepden Dele heeft gheseght Ick kan den Tempel Godts af-breken ende in drie dagen den selben opbouwen.
And said, This fellow said, I am able to destroy the temple of God, and to build it in three days.
「這個人曾說：『我能拆毀上帝的殿，三日內又建造起來。』」

S.FORM: Jrou ka ahpit ta Dadyllo, ni-k'ma tyni-æn, Assi-kow mat-tæ'i-vlli ki mamang? Mang ta hail-len nein mattæ'i-doumma ym-hou-an?
Jrou ka ahpit ta Dadyllo, ni-k'ma tyni-æn, Assi-kow mat-tæ'i-vlli ki mamang? Mang ta hail-len nein mattæ'i-doumma ym-hou-an?
S.TRANSL: Ende de Hooge-prieGer opltaende sepdetot hem En antwoordt ghy niets ? Wat ghetupghen dese tegenu ? |
And the high priest arose, and said unto him, Answerest thou nothing? what is it which these witness against thee?
大祭司就站起來，對耶穌說：「你甚麼都不回答嗎？這些人作見證告你的是甚麼呢？」

S.FORM: Râ ti Jesus ta ni-meipat, ka mattæ i-v'lli ta Dadyllo ni-k'ma tyni-æn, Paka-rihe-rihe-koh [mat-ta sou] ymhou-an ki Alid ka mæuagh, ka banna-ah-kow ymi-æn-an, ma lava ka tip-hhristus kow, ka Alak ki Alid?

Râ ti Jesus ta ni-meipat, ka mattæ i-v'lli ta Dadyllo ni-k'ma tyni-æn, Paka-rihe-rihe-koh [matta sou] ymhou-an ki Alid ka mæuagh, ka banna-ah-kow ymi-æn-an, ma lava ka tip-hhristus kow, ka Alak ki Alid?
S.TRANSL: Doch Jesus iweegh ftille ende de Hooge-priester antwoordede eyde tot hem Ack besweere u by den leben dighen Godt dat ghy ons Tseght of ghy rije de Chiiftus de Sone Godts *
But Jesus held his peace, And the high priest answered and said unto him, I adjure thee by the living God, that thou tell us whether thou be the Christ, the Son of God.
耶穌卻不言語。大祭司對他說：「我指着永生上帝叫你起誓告訴我們，你是上帝的兒子基督不是？」

S.FORM: Ni-k'ma tati Jesus tyni-een, Ni-mattæ i-rouk kow. Ra k'ma-koh ymoumi-æn, na hnnnan k'atta k'ytt'ei-moumi ta Alak ki ka'æuloung tou ierrong-eih tyn tou ouwal ki kailhgen [ki Alid] rou ierroua-ah tou pourarei ki vullum.

Ni-k'ma tati Jesus tyni-een, Ni-mattæ i-rouk kow. Ra k'ma-koh ymoumi-æn, na hnnnan k'atta k'ytt'ei-moumi ta Alak ki ka'æuloung tou ierrong-eih tyn tou ouwal ki kailhgen [ki Alid] rou ierroua-ah tou pourarei ki vullum.
S.TRANSL: Jesus sepde tot hem Ghy hebt het ghesegt.Doch ick segge u-lieden ban nu aen sult ghy sien den Sone des menschen sittende ter rechter-shandt ] der Kracht [Godts] ende komende op de Wolcken des hemels ;7
Jesus saith unto him, Thou hast said: nevertheless I say unto you, Hereafter shall ye see the Son of man sitting on the right hand of power, and coming in the clouds of heaven.
耶穌對他說：「你說的是。然而，我告訴你們，後來你們要看見人子坐在那權能者的右邊，駕着天上的雲降臨。」

S.FORM: Anna ta ni-ki it ta Dadyllo ki pammammien tyn, k'ma, Ni-barigh ta teni makou talum [ki Alid,] mangau-mi-an ta Mattæ'i-hail ka rouma? K'ytt'ei, ni-illing-igh'noumi hnyn ta bavarugh tyn [ki Alid.]
Anna ta ni-ki it ta Dadyllo ki pammammien tyn, k'ma, Ni-barigh ta teni makou talum [ki Alid,] mangau-mi-an ta Mattæ'i-hail ka rouma? K'ytt'ei, ni-illing-igh'noumi hnyn ta bavarugh tyn [ki Alid.]
S.TRANSL: Doe besscheurde de Hooght-puielter fijne kleederen segghende Hy heeft [Godt] gelaltert wat hebbeti wp noch getuygen ban noode? Hitt nu hebt gy sijne Godts-" [Godts-Jlafteringe ghehoort.
Then the high priest rent his clothes, saying, He hath spoken blasphemy; what further need have we of witnesses? behold, now ye have heard his blasphemy.
大祭司就撕開衣服，說：「他說了僭妄的話，我們何必再用見證人呢？這僭妄的話，現在你們都聽見了。

S.FORM: Pah-mang ta ryh-oumi? Rå neni ta ni-naattæi-vlli kima, [Oohoh] mamsing ki pakapapa-tapatei.
Pah-mang ta ryh-oumi? Rå neni ta ni-naattæi-vlli kima, [Oohoh] mamsing ki pakapapa-tapatei.
S.TRANSL: Wat dunckt u-liedens Ende sy antwoordende [eyden Hy is des doodts schuldigh.
What think ye? They answered and said, He is guilty of death.
你們的意見如何？」他們回答說：「他是該死的。」

S.FORM: Anna ta ni-padipaghan nein tou vlung tyn, ka ni-bouk-bouk en nein kina kmud tyni-æn.
Anna ta ni-padipaghan nein tou vlung tyn, ka ni-bouk-bouk en nein kina kmud tyni-æn.
S.TRANSL: Doe lpoghen lp in shn. aengesichte mde floegen hem met bupften, -
Then did they spit in his face, and buffeted him; and others smote him with the palms of their hands,
他們就吐唾沫在他臉上，用拳頭打他，也有用手掌打他的，說：

S.FORM: Ka pæni ki voual ta ni-tmaplægh tyni-en tou timi, kma, Kæi-dmir-ou-kame kmæih-tan 'hristus, ti taplægh kow ti mang?
Ka pæni ki voual ta ni-tmaplægh tyni-en tou timi, kma, Kæi-dmir-ou-kame kmæih-tan 'hristus, ti taplægh kow ti mang?
S.TRANSL: : Ende andere gaben hem Kinnebacks-flaghen eggende Propheteert ons Thiilte wieis't die u ghe-
Saying, Prophesy unto us, thou Christ, Who is he that smote thee?

S.FORM: Kani-mi-mala miraoung ta ti Petrus tou ta-tallæghin, ka saat ka kæuh-jna ka pairoung-in ta ni-iroua tyni-æn, k'ma, Ni-makoi lam-appa kow ta ymhou ti Jesus-an ka makka Galileä.
Kani-mi-mala miraoung ta ti Petrus tou ta-tallæghin, ka saat ka kæuh-jna ka pairoung-in ta ni-iroua tyni-æn, k'ma, Ni-makoi lam-appa kow ta ymhou ti Jesus-an ka makka Galileä.
S.TRANSL: Ende g sat buyten in de sale ende een dienstmaeght quam tot hem segde Ghy waert oock met Sesu ben Galilerr, —
Now Peter sat without in the palace: and a damsel came unto him, saying, Thou also wast with Jesus of Galilee.
彼得在外面院子裏坐着，有一個使女前來，說：「你素來也是同那加利利人耶穌一夥的。」

S.FORM: Râ æmah dmau ki taou ka ymmid, k'ma, Assi-mau ou mhgan kamang ta sou ouho.
Râ æmah dmau ki taou ka ymmid, k'ma, Assi-mau ou mhgan kamang ta sou ouho.
S.TRANSL: Mat? Hy loochende Het boor allen segghende Ak en weet mef wat gn legt.
But he denied before them all, saying, I know not what thou sayest.
彼得在眾人面前卻不承認，說：「我不知道你說的是甚麼！」

S.FORM: Jrou ka mou-mæla ta teni tou tangagh, ni-kmytta-appa ty-ni-an ta pani[ka jna ka pæiroung-in ka k'ma neini-æn ka ä'ia-koua hynna, Teni-appa ta na lam ti Jesus ka tæi-Nazareth.
Jrou ka mou-mæla ta teni tou tangagh, ni-kmytta-appa ty-ni-an ta pani[ka jna ka pæiroung-in ka k'ma neini-æn ka ä'ia-koua hynna, Teni-appa ta na lam ti Jesus ka tæi-Nazareth.
S.TRANSL: Ende als hy nae de boor poorte uptgingh lagh een andere [ dieastmaeght, ] mde sepde tot de gene die aldaer [waren,] Dele was oock met Jelu den Nararener.
And when he was gone out into the porch, another maid saw him, and said unto them that were there, This fellow was also with Jesus of Nazareth.
既出去，到了門口，又有一個使女看見他，就對那裏的人說：「這個人也是同拿撒勒人耶穌一夥的。」

S.FORM: Ka ni-lala rmau ki sou ka na papakakariherihe, Assi-man kalang-en ta ta'u.
Ka ni-lala rmau ki sou ka na papakakariherihe, Assi-man kalang-en ta ta'u.
S.TRANSL: Endehylochende het .wederom met eenen eedt [scgghende,] Ick en kenne den mensche met.
And again he denied with an oath, I do not know the man.
彼得又不承認，並且起誓說：「我不認得那個人。」

S.FORM: . Nda matouk ki kidi k'an-ni-mou-koua ta mirouh-ko-hynna, ka ni-k'ma ti Petrus-an, Missing ymhou ta na lam-appa nein, nda pakalang-kow ki yng-au ouho.
. Nda matouk ki kidi k'an-ni-mou-koua ta mirouh-ko-hynna, ka ni-k'ma ti Petrus-an, Missing ymhou ta na lam-appa nein, nda pakalang-kow ki yngau ouho.
S.TRANSL: Ende cen weymigh daer nae dieder ondem y komende seyden tot Petjum Waer lick ghy zijt oock ban die want oock uwe sprake maeckt u openbaer. |
And after a while came unto him they that stood by, and said to Peter, Surely thou also art one of them; for thy speech bewrayeth thee.
過了不多的時候，旁邊站着的人前來，對彼得說：「你真是他們一黨的，你的口音把你露出來了。」

S.FORM: Anna ta ni-manæunamou mahko avavagh tyni-een pakarihe-rihe-appa ki sou, Assi-mau kalang-en ta ta'u..
Anna ta ni-manæunamou mahko avavagh tyni-een pakarihe-rihe-appa ki sou, Assi-mau kalang-en ta ta'u..
S.TRANSL: Doe begon hy [kch] te berbloecken ende te sweeren Ick en kenne den mensche niet.
Then began he to curse and to swear, saying, I know not the man. And immediately the cock crew.
彼得就發咒起誓地說：「我不認得那個人。」立時，雞就叫了。

S.FORM: Ka ni-tma-touk mouni ta taoukka: ka ni-hmi-balei ta ti Pe-trus ki na sou ti Jesus ka ni-k'ma tyni-æn, Tou-ouro ki oum-eih ki taoukka, sau-touroul-ah-kow rmau jau-an. Karou ni-samamala, ni-ænum [ki ryhtyn] ni-tmangi-tangi-ato. Kararouha kytti.ænæb ki pytto ki lbæb ki soulat.

Ka ni-tma-touk mouni ta taoukka: ka ni-hmi-balei ta ti Pe-trus ki na sou ti Jesus ka ni-k'ma tyni-æn, Tou-ouro ki oum-eih ki taoukka, sau-touroul-ah-kow rmau jau-an. Karou ni-samamala, ni-ænum [ki ryhtyn] ni-tmangi-tangi-ato. Kararouha kytti.ænæb ki pytto ki lbæb ki soulat.
S.TRANSL: Ende terstondt kraeyde de ham : ende Petyus wiert indachtig des woorts Fesu die tot hem gheseght hadde Eer de hane gekraept sal hebben sult ghy my driemael berlocheneu. Ende nae buyten gaende weende hy bitterlick.
And Peter remembered the word of Jesus, which said unto him, Before the cock crow, thou shalt deny me thrice. And he went out, and wept bitterly.
彼得想起耶穌所說的話：「雞叫以先，你要三次不認我。」他就出去痛哭。
